chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D- 2536 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For katcha Peshi 30.01.2018. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto Asstt:A.G -=-=- This petition is called for hearing, neither petitioner nor his counsel are present. No intimation is received. Intimation notice was sent to the counsel for the petitioner as well as petitioner for today but it is observed that none is present on behalf of the petitioner. It also appears from the record that this petition was filed on 23.9.2016 with following prayer:- a) That, this Honourable court may be pleased to set aside the order dated 30.8.2016 of learned respondent No.4 of dismissing the application U/s 22-A& B Cr.P.C. b) That, this Honourable court may be pleased to direct the respondent No.3 to lodge the FGIR of the petitioner. c) Any other relief which this Honourable court deems fit and proper under the circumstances of the case. We have also gone through the order dated 30.8.2016 passed by the trial court and it appears that said order is perfect in all aspect and does not require any interference of this court, therefore, this petition has no merits which is dismissed. However, the petitioner would be at liberty to file direct complaint for redressal of his grievance, if he so desire and after filing of direct complaint, the trial court shall decide the same in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE A.Rasheed
